name: weaver-learning
description: W5 — Gauss Learning (Weaver). Per-developer preference persistence via exponential moving averages with Allay-A4 atomic serialization. Tracks commit-style (scope rate, body rate, types), branch-naming conventions, PR turnaround, reviewer overrides, W2 corrections. Priors flow back to W1/W2/W3/W4 after the bootstrap sample floor.
